summary: Lead replaced the systems_architect reviewer for M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 after the previous reviewer stream disconnected before completion and produced no handoff. Replacement systems_architect will perform a fresh read-only review of the same writer REVIEW commit and handoff.

tests_run.result: Previous systems reviewer had no completed handoff after stream disconnect.
Spawned replacement systems_architect thread 019f077e-dcc1-7de3-b254-2bf9b1e2442e, nickname Keystone.
No valid systems review handoff existed before replacement.

decisions: Do not fabricate reviewer acceptance after stream disconnect.
Route the same writer REVIEW commit to a replacement systems_architect for fresh read-only review.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and Human Gate boundaries.
risks: R4 shared sim/protocol/save surface requires real systems review before lead acceptance.
Untracked ui-samples/ remains unrelated, unstaged, and untouched.
requested_action: Replacement systems_architect should review actual diff, tests, determinism, package boundaries, protocol/save compatibility, and task scope, then return ACCEPT or REQUEST_CHANGES handoff.
